name: Bophuthatswana (1973–1994)
description: An orange field charged centrally with a white disc bearing the leopard's head emblem of Bophuthatswana.
history: Flag of Bophuthatswana, one of the four nominally independent 'Bantustans' (along with Transkei, Ciskei, and Venda) created by apartheid-era South Africa as a 'homeland' for the Tswana people. Internationally unrecognised. Reincorporated into South Africa in 1994 with the end of apartheid.
